verses.text: The Merciful
has taught the Qur’ān.
He created the human.
He taught him the explanation.
The sun and the moon (move) in predictable paths,
and the star and the tree prostrate themselves.
The sky – He raised it, and He laid down the scale
– do not transgress insolently concerning the scale,

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَقِيمُوا۟ ٱلْوَزْنَ بِٱلْقِسْطِ وَلَا تُخْسِرُوا۟ ٱلْمِيزَانَ
verses.text: but establish the weight in justice, and do not cheat concerning the scale.
And the earth – He laid it down for all living creatures.
On it (there are) fruit, and date palms with sheaths,
and grain with its husk, and fragrant herbs.
Which of the blessings of your Lord will you two call a lie?
He created the human from clay like pottery,

verses.quran_arabic: وَخَلَقَ ٱلْجَآنَّ مِن مَّارِجٍۢ مِّن نَّارٍۢ
verses.text: and He created the jinn from a mixture of fire.
Which of the blessings of your Lord will you two call a lie?
Lord of the two Easts, Lord of the two Wests.
Which of the blessings of your Lord will you two call a lie?
He let loose the two seas (which) meet.
Between them (there is) a barrier (which) they do not seek (to cross).
Which of the blessings of your Lord will you two call a lie?
Pearl and coral come forth from both of them.

canonical_variants.english: From them are brought out pearls and corals.
From them are brought out pearls and corals.
From them are brought out pearls and corals.
From them are brought out pearls and corals.

verses.text: Which of the blessings of your Lord will you two call a lie?

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَهُ ٱلْجَوَارِ ٱلْمُنشَـَٔاتُ فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ كَٱلْأَعْلَٰمِ
verses.text: His are the (ships) running, raised up on the sea like landmarks.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلَهُ ٱلۡجَوَارِ ٱلۡمُنشِـَٔاتُ فِي ٱلۡبَحۡرِ كَٱلۡأَعۡلَٰمِ
canonical_variants.english: His are the running ships that raise their sails in the sea like banners.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلَهُ ٱلۡجَوَارِ ٱلۡمُنشَـَٔاتُ فِي ٱلۡبَحۡرِ كَٱلۡأَعۡلَٰمِ
canonical_variants.english: His are the running ships, whose sails are raised in the sea like banners.

verses.text: Which of the blessings of your Lord will you two call a lie?
All who are on it pass away,

verses.quran_arabic: وَيَبْقَىٰ وَجْهُ رَبِّكَ ذُو ٱلْجَلَٰلِ وَٱلْإِكْرَامِ
verses.text: but the face of your Lord remains, full of splendor and honor.
Which of the blessings of your Lord will you two call a lie?

verses.quran_arabic: يَسْـَٔلُهُۥ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ هُوَ فِى شَأْنٍۢ
verses.text: (All) who are in the heavens and the earth make requests of Him. Every day He (is engaged) in some task.
Which of the blessings of your Lord will you two call a lie?
Soon We shall be free (to attend) to you, you two burdens!
Which of the blessings of your Lord will you two call a lie?

verses.quran_arabic: يَٰمَعْشَرَ ٱلْجِنِّ وَٱلْإِنسِ إِنِ ٱسْتَطَعْتُمْ أَن تَنفُذُوا۟ مِنْ أَقْطَارِ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ فَٱنفُذُوا۟ ۚ لَا تَنفُذُونَ إِلَّا بِسُلْطَٰنٍۢ
verses.text: Assembly of jinn and humankind! If you are able to pass beyond the confines of the heavens and the earth, pass! You will not pass beyond (them) except by authority.
Which of the blessings of your Lord will you two call a lie?

verses.quran_arabic: يُرْسَلُ عَلَيْكُمَا شُوَاظٌۭ مِّن نَّارٍۢ وَنُحَاسٌۭ فَلَا تَنتَصِرَانِ
verses.text: A flame of fire and a furious wind will be sent against you, and you will not (be able to) defend yourselves.

canonical_variants.english: Flares of fire and (of) brass, will be sent upon youdl, and you will not find help.
Flares of fire and (of) brass, will be sent upon youdl, and you will not find help.
Flares of fire and (of) brass, will be sent upon youdl, and you will not find help.
Flares of fire and (of) brass, will be sent upon youdl, and you will not find help.

verses.text: Which of the blessings of your Lord will you two call a lie?

verses.quran_arabic: فَإِذَا ٱنشَقَّتِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ فَكَانَتْ وَرْدَةًۭ كَٱلدِّهَانِ
verses.text: When the sky is split open and turns red like oil –
Which of the blessings of your Lord will you two call a lie?

verses.quran_arabic: فَيَوْمَئِذٍۢ لَّا يُسْـَٔلُ عَن ذَنۢبِهِۦٓ إِنسٌۭ وَلَا جَآنٌّۭ
verses.text: – on that Day neither human nor jinn will be questioned about his sin.
Which of the blessings of your Lord will you two call a lie?

verses.quran_arabic: يُعْرَفُ ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ بِسِيمَٰهُمْ فَيُؤْخَذُ بِٱلنَّوَٰصِى وَٱلْأَقْدَامِ
verses.text: The sinners will be known by their mark, and they will be seized by the hair and the feet.
Which of the blessings of your Lord will you two call a lie?

verses.quran_arabic: هَٰذِهِۦ جَهَنَّمُ ٱلَّتِى يُكَذِّبُ بِهَا ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ
verses.text: This is Gehenna which the sinners called a lie.
They will go around between it and hot, boiling (water).
Which of the blessings of your Lord will you two call a lie?
But for the one who fears the position of his Lord, (there are) two gardens –
Which of the blessings of your Lord will you two call a lie?
– with branches –
Which of the blessings of your Lord will you two call a lie?
– in both (there are) two flowing springs –
Which of the blessings of your Lord will you two call a lie?
– in both (there are) two of every (kind of) fruit –
Which of the blessings of your Lord will you two call a lie?

verses.quran_arabic: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ فُرُشٍۭ بَطَآئِنُهَا مِنْ إِسْتَبْرَقٍۢ ۚ وَجَنَى ٱلْجَنَّتَيْنِ دَانٍۢ
verses.text: – (they are) reclining on couches lined with brocade, and fresh fruit of both gardens is near (at hand) –
Which of the blessings of your Lord will you two call a lie?

verses.quran_arabic: فِيهِنَّ قَٰصِرَٰتُ ٱلطَّرْفِ لَمْ يَطْمِثْهُنَّ إِنسٌۭ قَبْلَهُمْ وَلَا جَآنٌّۭ
verses.text: – in them (there are maidens) restraining (their) glances – no man or jinn has had sex with them before them –
Which of the blessings of your Lord will you two call a lie?
– as if they were rubies and coral –
Which of the blessings of your Lord will you two call a lie?
Is the payment for good anything but the good?
Which of the blessings of your Lord will you two call a lie?
And besides these two (there are another) two gardens –
Which of the blessings of your Lord will you two call a lie?
– deep green –
Which of the blessings of your Lord will you two call a lie?
– in both (there are) two springs gushing forth –
Which of the blessings of your Lord will you two call a lie?
– in both (there are) fruit, and date palms, and pomegranates –
Which of the blessings of your Lord will you two call a lie?
– in them (there are) good and beautiful (maidens) –
Which of the blessings of your Lord will you two call a lie?
– dark-eyed (maidens), confined in tents –
Which of the blessings of your Lord will you two call a lie?

verses.quran_arabic: لَمْ يَطْمِثْهُنَّ إِنسٌۭ قَبْلَهُمْ وَلَا جَآنٌّۭ
verses.text: – no man or jinn has had sex with them before them –
Which of the blessings of your Lord will you two call a lie?

verses.quran_arabic: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ رَفْرَفٍ خُضْرٍۢ وَعَبْقَرِىٍّ حِسَانٍۢ
verses.text: – (they are) reclining on green cushions and beautiful carpets –
Which of the blessings of your Lord will you two call a lie?

verses.quran_arabic: تَبَٰرَكَ ٱسْمُ رَبِّكَ ذِى ٱلْجَلَٰلِ وَٱلْإِكْرَامِ
verses.text: Blessed (be) the name of your Lord, full of splendor and honor.
